# ReUGC

> AI UGC video maker. Create user-generated-style videos with lifelike AI actors — 50x cheaper than hiring creators, ready in under 2 minutes.

## About

ReUGC is an AI-powered platform that generates UGC (user-generated content) style videos using realistic AI actors. Brands use ReUGC to create product demos, testimonials, ad creatives, and social content at scale without hiring human creators.

- Website: https://reugc.com
- App: https://studio.reugc.com
- Pricing: Starter $49/mo (10 videos), Pro $99/mo (25 videos), Pro Plus $199/mo (60 videos)

## Key Features

- 100+ AI actors with natural lip-sync, gestures, and expressions
- 29 languages with native-sounding speech
- AI script generation
- Custom brand kits
- Batch video generation for creative testing
- Commercial usage rights on all plans

## Use Cases

- UGC-style ads for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Google
- Product demos and reviews
- Testimonial videos
- Social content (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)
- Explainer videos
- Multilingual video localization

## Content Sections

- /alternative — Comparisons with other AI video tools (Arcads, HeyGen, Synthesia, etc.)
- /industries — Industry-specific guides (e-commerce, SaaS, beauty, fitness, etc.)
- /platforms — Platform-specific ad specs and scripts (TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, etc.)
- /create — Video format guides with script frameworks
- /glossary — Marketing and AI video terminology
- /templates — Ready-to-use UGC video script templates
- /blog — Guides, insights, and strategies
- /use-cases — Use cases by industry and content type
- /pricing — Plans and FAQ
